text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The echoing cheers of the crowd at<n>the Nakayama
Racecourse herald the<n>opening of the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Having come to the realization that<n>she would not
be here on luck alone,<n>Matikanefukukitaru vows
to give the<n>race everything she has.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She steps forth to take on the Arima
Kinen—carrying the hope that running<n>with all her
might will turn her into a<n>lucky Umamusume who
brings joy to<n>all.
